title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) Throuh the Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Sign a Deed of Donation, Donating to the Philippine National Police the Three Hundred Seventy-three Square Meters (373 SQ.M) of Land, Currently Occupied by the Philippine National Police PNP) Los Baños Municipal Station and Owned by the Municipal Government of Los Baños Being Covered by Tax Declaration No. 11-0001-00039, Located at Barangay Baybayin, Los Baños, Laguna.
